roleSetup: You are a senior full-stack product engineer.
projectGoal: Write one clear sentence describing the project goal.

basePromptSections.title: Core Business Requirements
items: Put your original business prompt for the AI here.
You can describe features, pages, flows, rules, visuals, or interaction requirements in your preferred style.

baseRequirements: Initialize AicadeSDK in the correct order with init(...), waitForReady(), and getModule(...).
Reuse SDK and module instances instead of recreating them repeatedly.
compatibilityRequirements: Respect iframe sandbox restrictions and opaque-origin limitations.
Replace browser localStorage usage with LocalStorageTools.

exchange.trigger: Trigger at a business settlement or completion step.

technicalRequirements: Extend within the current project environment.
